backend/main.mo: Main actor entry point that runs the migration module to initialize the backend canister.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining data types (StudySession, UserSettings, StreakData, SyllabusChapter) and a run function that transforms OldActor state to NewActor (currently empty).
backend/studySession.mo: Module exporting the StudySession type with startTime, endTime, completed status, and optional chapterId fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features related to investigating deployment issues, fixing application errors, and ensuring frontend-backend connectivity.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 21 frontend files covering components, hooks, styling, and type definitions for the Tracky study timer application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space for consistent color palette across the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Tracky application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with authentication flow, backend availability alert, comprehensive logging, and conditional rendering of authenticated dashboard or welcome screen with footer.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Authentication button component handling login/logout actions with loading states and appropriate icons (LogIn/LogOut/Loader2).
frontend/src/components/ChapterManager.t: Chapter management component with CRUD operations, completion toggling, progress statistics, inline add/edit forms with validation, and delete confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/DailyQuote.tsx: Card component displaying a daily motivational quote with quote icon and author attribution using gradient background styling.
frontend/src/components/PomodoroTimer.ts: Main Pomodoro timer component displaying countdown, progress bar, play/pause/reset controls, optional chapter selection for work sessions, and configured work/break durations.
frontend/src/components/SessionHistory.t: Displays a filterable list of completed study sessions with total session count and time statistics, supporting filtering by chapter or showing all/unassociated sessions.
frontend/src/components/SessionHistoryIt: Renders an individual study session item showing date, time range, duration, and associated chapter information with icons.
frontend/src/components/StatisticsDashbo: Dashboard displaying study statistics including total time, average session length, chapter-specific time/session counts, and chapter completion progress with visual charts.
frontend/src/components/StreakDisplay.ts: Shows the current study streak count in days with a flame icon in a gradient card.
frontend/src/components/StudyChart.tsx: Renders multiple chart visualizations (bar, line, pie) for daily/weekly study time, session distribution by hour, chapter time/session breakdown, and chapter completion statistics using recharts.
frontend/src/components/TimerSettings.ts: Settings panel allowing users to configure work and break durations (1-90 minutes) with validation and save functionality.
frontend/src/data/motivationalQuotes.ts: Defines a Quote interface and exports an array of 33 motivational quotes with text and author fields for display throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Authentication hook that combines Internet Identity login with backend authentication, providing login/logout mutations that call backend methods and invalidate all relevant query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyQuote.ts: Hook that returns a deterministic daily motivational quote by using the current date as a seed to select from the quotes array, ensuring the same quote appears throughout the day.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, identity state, login/logout flows, and providing status tracking throughout the authentication process.
frontend/src/hooks/usePomodoro.ts: Pomodoro timer hook managing work/break cycles with configurable durations, integrating with backend session tracking (start/end mutations), chapter selection, and providing timer controls (start/pause/reset) with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend data operations including streak tracking, session history, settings management, session start/end, statistics, and syllabus chapter CRUD operations, all with error handling and method existence checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm earthy color palette for both light and dark modes, plus base typography styles for headings.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the application including StudySession, UserSettings, SyllabusChapter, StreakData, and an ExtendedBackendInterface with all backend method signatures.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, custom border radius variables, box shadows, and keyframe animations for UI components.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (authentication, Pomodoro timer, UI design, streak tracking, session history, settings, quotes, statistics, syllabus management) with a known issue about user account creation failing in production.
